title: eriachne glabrata
intro: Eriachne glabrata, also known as the smooth eriachne, is a species of grass native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its smooth leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eriachne glabrata include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Eriachne glabrata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically in the form of poultices and salves.
